SHORT NAME: TOTALCST 

LONG NAME: TOT_RX_CST_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 14 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 10 to 14 in 2025. Starting in 2010, this variable includes the vaccine 
administration fee, when applicable. Starting March 4, 2022, the vaccine administration fee may 
include an additional dispensing fee paid for Emergency Use Authorization oral antiviral drugs 
procured by the U.S.
